statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: bool removeElement(vector<int>& nums, int val); };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public boolean removeElement(int[] nums, int val); }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def removeElement(self, nums: list[int], val: int) -> int: pass

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: bool removeElement(vector<int>& nums, int val) { if (val != nums[0]) return false; int i = 0; while (i < nums.size()) { if (nums[i] != val) { i++; } else { nums.erase(nums.begin() + i); i--; } } return true; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public boolean removeElement(int[] nums, int val) { if (val != nums[0]) return false; int i = 0; while (i < nums.length) { if (nums[i] != val) { i++; } else { nums = Arrays.copyOf(nums, nums.length - 1); i--; } } return true; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def removeElement(self, nums: list[int], val: int) -> int: if val != nums[0]: return False; i = 0; while i < len(nums): if nums[i] != val: i += 1; else: nums.pop(i); i -= 1; return True;
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function removeElement(nums, val) { if (val != nums[0]) return false; let i = 0; while (i < nums.length) { if (nums[i] != val) { i++; } else { nums.splice(i, 1); i--; } } return true; }

functionSignature.python: def removeElement(self, nums: list[int], val: int) -> bool;

solutions.python: def removeElement(self, nums: list[int], val: int) -> None: i = 0; while i < len(nums): if nums[i] == val: nums.pop(i); else: i += 1; return;
solutions.cpp: bool Solution::removeElement(vector<int>& nums, int val) { int i = 0; while (i < nums.size()) { if (nums[i] == val) { nums.erase(nums.begin() + i); } else { i++; } } return true; }
